name: devutils
title: DevUtils
description: 46+ developer utilities — encoding, formatting, generating, parsing, and more. Works entirely offline.
author: dharun

commands.name: json-formatter
commands.title: JSON Formatter / Validator
commands.description: Format, validate, and minify JSON

commands.name: base64
commands.title: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
commands.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings

commands.name: url-encoder
commands.title: URL Encoder / Decoder
commands.description: Encode and decode URL strings

commands.name: html-entity
commands.title: HTML Entity Encoder / Decoder
commands.description: Encode and decode HTML entities

commands.name: backslash-escaper
commands.title: Backslash Escaper / Unescaper
commands.description: Escape or unescape backslash characters in strings

commands.name: hex-ascii
commands.title: Hex ↔ ASCII Converter
commands.description: Convert between hexadecimal and ASCII strings

commands.name: yaml-json
commands.title: YAML ↔ JSON Converter
commands.description: Convert between YAML and JSON formats

commands.name: json-csv
commands.title: JSON ↔ CSV Converter
commands.description: Convert between JSON and CSV formats

commands.name: xml-beautifier
commands.title: XML Beautifier / Minifier
commands.description: Format and minify XML

commands.name: html-beautifier
commands.title: HTML Beautifier / Minifier
commands.description: Format and minify HTML code

commands.name: html-to-jsx
commands.title: HTML to JSX Converter
commands.description: Convert HTML markup to JSX syntax

commands.name: css-beautifier
commands.title: CSS Beautifier / Minifier
commands.description: Format and minify CSS code

commands.name: js-beautifier
commands.title: JavaScript Beautifier / Minifier
commands.description: Format and minify JavaScript code

commands.name: sql-formatter
commands.title: SQL Formatter
commands.description: Format SQL queries for readability

commands.name: uuid-generator
commands.title: UUID / ULID Generator
commands.description: Generate UUIDs (v1/v4), ULIDs, and Nano IDs

commands.name: hash-generator
commands.title: Hash Generator
commands.description: Generate MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA512 hashes

commands.name: random-string
commands.title: Random String Generator
commands.description: Generate random strings with customizable options

commands.name: regexp-tester
commands.title: RegExp Tester
commands.description: Test regular expressions with live matching

commands.name: string-inspector
commands.title: String Inspector
commands.description: Analyze string properties: length, bytes, lines, words

commands.name: string-case
commands.title: String Case Converter
commands.description: Convert between camelCase, snake_case, PascalCase, kebab-case, etc.

commands.name: text-diff
commands.title: Text Diff Checker
commands.description: Compare and highlight differences between two texts

commands.name: line-sort
commands.title: Line Sort / Dedupe
commands.description: Sort, reverse, and deduplicate lines of text

commands.name: unix-timestamp
commands.title: Unix Time Converter
commands.description: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa

commands.name: url-parser
commands.title: URL Parser
commands.description: Parse and analyze URL components

commands.name: cron-parser
commands.title: Cron Job Parser
commands.description: Parse and explain cron job expressions

commands.name: jwt-debugger
commands.title: JWT Debugger
commands.description: Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens

commands.name: json-path
commands.title: JSON Path Selector
commands.description: Extract data from JSON using JSONPath expressions

commands.name: color-converter
commands.title: Color Converter
commands.description: Convert colors between Hex, RGB, HSL, and more

commands.name: number-base
commands.title: Number Base Converter
commands.description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal

commands.name: lorem-ipsum
commands.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
commands.description: Generate placeholder lorem ipsum text

commands.name: markdown-preview
commands.title: Markdown Preview
commands.description: Preview Markdown rendered as formatted text

commands.name: html-preview
commands.title: HTML Preview
commands.description: Preview rendered HTML in your default browser

commands.name: curl-to-code
commands.title: cURL to Code
commands.description: Convert cURL commands to Python, JavaScript, Go, and more

commands.name: x509-decoder
commands.title: X.509 Certificate Decoder
commands.description: Decode X.509 SSL/TLS certificates to human-readable format

commands.name: qr-code
commands.title: QR Code Generator
commands.description: Generate QR codes from text

commands.name: svg-to-css
commands.title: SVG to CSS Converter
commands.description: Convert SVG code to CSS background with Base64 or URL encoding

commands.name: php-serializer
commands.title: PHP Serializer / Unserializer
commands.description: Serialize and unserialize PHP data format

commands.name: query-string-json
commands.title: Query String ↔ JSON
commands.description: Convert URL query strings to JSON and back
